title: Cooperation with other entities
doc_html:
§1405.  Cooperation with other entities

The commissioner may cooperate with and enter into agreements with governmental agencies of this state, other states, agencies of the federal government, and private associations in order to carry out the purpose and provisions of this Part.

Acts 2010, No. 579, §1.
